sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44513" key="eu)morfo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐμορφ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n44513.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">become beautiful</tr_>, dub.l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:344:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">344.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
